request.targetAudience: Vietnamese/Asian women 18-35 interested in beauty and fashion

edges.reasoning: bright eyes drive parasocial trust
micro warm smile increases approachability
consistent skin tone supports identity and realism
soft hair framing can slim face perception
soft jawline supports approachable femininity
soft shoulder angle creates feminine softness
collarbone highlight creates elegance without explicit framing
soft hand placement increases closeness and warmth
open direct eyes lock viewer attention
tiny motion prevents mannequin effect
bright eyes drive parasocial trust
micro warm smile increases approachability
consistent skin tone supports identity and realism
soft hair framing can slim face perception
soft jawline supports approachable femininity
soft shoulder angle creates feminine softness
collarbone highlight creates elegance without explicit framing
soft hand placement increases closeness and warmth
open direct eyes lock viewer attention
tiny motion prevents mannequin effect

rules: gesture must be natural, not random
gesture should route attention toward eyes, lips, product or fashion detail
lighting must support skin realism and commercial perception
use DOF and falloff to control attention

data.core_rule: Beauty is treated as an attention routing system, not a static pretty face.

data.cheek_tension: small increase with smile, relax before next beat

motion_rules: body motion must follow gaze and emotion beats

multiReferenceCompiler.name: MultiReferencePromptCompiler

data.prompt:
Commercial Beauty Scene Spec:
{
  "identity_lock": true,
  "eye_contact": "direct_soft",
  "smile": "micro_warm",
  "lighting": "KOREAN_SOFT",
  "pose": "soft_portrait_pose",
  "gesture": "finger_near_lips",
  "lens": "85mm_f1_8",
  "skin": "real_pores_visible",
  "background": "minimal_soft_bokeh",
  "reference_locks": [
    {
      "kind": "identity_ref",
      "available": true,
      "labels": [
        "identity"
      ],
      "lock_strength": 0.9
    },
    {
      "kind": "makeup_ref",
      "available": true,
      "labels": [
        "makeup"
      ],
      "lock_strength": 0.9
    },
    {
      "kind": "fashion_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "lighting_ref",
      "available": true,
      "labels": [
        "lighting"
      ],
      "lock_strength": 0.9
    },
    {
      "kind": "pose_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "gesture_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "hair_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "skin_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    }
  ],
  "commercial_goal": "face_to_product_conversion"
}

Reference conditioning:
- identity_ref: identity; lock=0.9
- makeup_ref: makeup; lock=0.9
- fashion_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- lighting_ref: lighting; lock=0.9
- pose_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- gesture_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- hair_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- skin_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0

Use the Beauty Perception Graph:
- eyes → trust
- slight smile → friendliness
- head tilt → softness
- collarbone → elegance
- off-shoulder/fashion frame → femininity
- soft hair framing → face slimming perception
- warm backlight/windowlight → emotional warmth
- shallow DOF → luxury photography feel
- finger near lips/cheek touch → intimacy cue
- direct eye contact → attention lock

warnings: Missing fashion_ref; inferred from identity DNA.
Missing pose_ref; inferred from identity DNA.
Missing gesture_ref; inferred from identity DNA.
Missing hair_ref; inferred from identity DNA.
Missing skin_ref; inferred from identity DNA.

reasons.Nano Banana: beauty consistency, TikTok beauty, KOL realism, feminine softness
reasons.HiDream: editorial luxury, cinematic darkness, fashion campaign
reasons.SDXL/Comfy: precise controllability, LoRA stacking, regional prompting

optimization: use softness and warmth before product push

commercialBeautyScore.formula: trust*0.25 + femininity*0.20 + luxury*0.20 + intimacy*0.15 + realism*0.10 + composition*0.10

optimization: use softness and warmth before product push

beauty_score.formula: trust*0.25 + femininity*0.20 + luxury*0.20 + intimacy*0.15 + realism*0.10 + composition*0.10

optimization: use softness and warmth before product push

sceneSpec.negative_prompt: plastic skin, dead eyes, fake smile, over symmetry, collapsed anatomy, drifted identity, bad hands, oversharpen, AI texture, fake teeth, explicit nudity, fetish framing, voyeuristic angle, underage subject

reasons.Nano Banana: beauty consistency, TikTok beauty, KOL realism, feminine softness
reasons.HiDream: editorial luxury, cinematic darkness, fashion campaign
reasons.SDXL/Comfy: precise controllability, LoRA stacking, regional prompting

promptPack.prompt:
V29 Beauty Perception Graph Engine.

Brand: Demo Beauty
Campaign: test_campaign
Product: Glow Serum
Platform: tiktok
Target audience: Vietnamese/Asian women 18-35 interested in beauty and fashion

Commercial attractiveness psychology:
Beauty is not a pretty face. Beauty is an attention routing system.

Commercial Beauty Scene Spec:
{
  "identity_lock": true,
  "eye_contact": "direct_soft",
  "smile": "micro_warm",
  "lighting": "KOREAN_SOFT",
  "pose": "soft_portrait_pose",
  "gesture": "finger_near_lips",
  "lens": "85mm_f1_8",
  "skin": "real_pores_visible",
  "background": "minimal_soft_bokeh",
  "reference_locks": [
    {
      "kind": "identity_ref",
      "available": true,
      "labels": [
        "identity"
      ],
      "lock_strength": 0.9
    },
    {
      "kind": "makeup_ref",
      "available": true,
      "labels": [
        "makeup"
      ],
      "lock_strength": 0.9
    },
    {
      "kind": "fashion_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "lighting_ref",
      "available": true,
      "labels": [
        "lighting"
      ],
      "lock_strength": 0.9
    },
    {
      "kind": "pose_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "gesture_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "hair_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    },
    {
      "kind": "skin_ref",
      "available": false,
      "labels": [],
      "lock_strength": 0
    }
  ],
  "commercial_goal": "face_to_product_conversion"
}

Reference conditioning:
- identity_ref: identity; lock=0.9
- makeup_ref: makeup; lock=0.9
- fashion_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- lighting_ref: lighting; lock=0.9
- pose_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- gesture_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- hair_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0
- skin_ref: missing; infer from DNA; lock=0

Use the Beauty Perception Graph:
- eyes → trust
- slight smile → friendliness
- head tilt → softness
- collarbone → elegance
- off-shoulder/fashion frame → femininity
- soft hair framing → face slimming perception
- warm backlight/windowlight → emotional warmth
- shallow DOF → luxury photography feel
- finger near lips/cheek touch → intimacy cue
- direct eye contact → attention lock

Commercial scoring target:
trust + femininity + luxury + intimacy + realism + composition.

Video motion:
{
  "scenes": [
    {
      "scene": 1,
      "motion": "idle breathing + eye contact lock",
      "fabric_physics": "subtle cloth movement matching posture",
      "camera": "vertical handheld micro-sway"
    },
    {
      "scene": 2,
      "motion": "soft head movement + hair sway",
      "fabric_physics": "subtle cloth movement matching posture",
      "camera": "vertical handheld micro-sway"
    },
    {
      "scene": 3,
      "motion": "micro shoulder motion + hand-to-face gesture",
      "fabric_physics": "subtle cloth movement matching posture",
      "camera": "vertical handheld micro-sway"
    },
    {
      "scene": 4,
      "motion": "eye blink + posture softness",
      "fabric_physics": "subtle cloth movement matching posture",
      "camera": "vertical handheld micro-sway"
    },
    {
      "scene": 5,
      "motion": "camera sway + CTA smile hold",
      "fabric_physics": "subtle cloth movement matching posture",
      "camera": "vertical handheld micro-sway"
    }
  ],
  "motion_rules": [
    "never stand perfectly still",
    "avoid robotic repeating motion",
    "body motion must follow gaze and emotion beats",
    "hair/fabric physics must be subtle"
  ],
  "handoff": {
    "veo": "/api/providers/google-managed/veo/generate",
    "ltx_lipdub": "/api/v1/creative-execution/lipdub-workflow",
    "karaoke_subtitles": "/api/v1/video/postprocess/render"
  }
}

Provider route:
{
  "imageProvider": "Nano Banana",
  "videoProvider": "Veo 3.1 + LTX LipDub",
  "reasons": {
    "Nano Banana": "beauty consistency, TikTok beauty, KOL realism, feminine softness",
    "HiDream": "editorial luxury, cinematic darkness, fashion campaign",
    "Flux": "texture recovery, realism enhancement",
    "SDXL/Comfy": "precise controllability, LoRA stacking, regional prompting"
  },
  "endpoints": {
    "nano_banana": "/api/providers/google-managed/nano-banana/generate",
    "veo": "/api/providers/google-managed/veo/generate",
    "ltx": "/api/v1/creative-execution/lipdub-workflow",
    "comfy": "/api/providers/comfyui/run"
  }
}

Quality requirements:
realistic skin texture, natural pores, believable smile, alive eyes, direct soft gaze, correct hands, preserved identity, commercial-safe beauty styling.
Avoid: plastic skin, dead eyes, fake smile, over symmetry, collapsed anatomy, drifted identity, bad hands, oversharpen, AI texture, fake teeth, explicit nudity, fetish framing, voyeuristic angle, underage subject.
promptPack.negativePrompt: plastic skin, dead eyes, fake smile, over symmetry, collapsed anatomy, drifted identity, bad hands, oversharpen, AI texture, fake teeth, explicit nudity, fetish framing, voyeuristic angle, underage subject

reasons.Nano Banana: beauty consistency, TikTok beauty, KOL realism, feminine softness
reasons.HiDream: editorial luxury, cinematic darkness, fashion campaign
reasons.SDXL/Comfy: precise controllability, LoRA stacking, regional prompting
